failed_sql: SELECT pjl.id, pjl.entity_type, pjl.records_purged, pjl.records_held, pjl.started_at, pjl.completed_at, pjl.status FROM purge_job_log pjl WHERE pjl.entity_type = 'NOTIFICATION' AND pjl.status = 'SUCCESS' ORDER BY pjl.started_at DESC
